_comment: Samples that are expected to fail until the referenced issue is fixed. The runner reports these as XFAIL (expected failure) and does not exit non-zero. If a sample on this list passes, it is reported as UNEXPECTED PASS — remove the entry.

figure-gallery-bindings.epub.reason: Uses <embed> plugin elements which require allow-scripts in the iframe sandbox.

quiz-bindings.epub.reason: Interactive quiz uses scripted bindings; needs sandbox allow-scripts opt-in.
